name: Ubiquiti AI Pro Enhancer White
title: Ubiquiti AI Pro Enhancer White
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi AI Pro Enhancer (UACC-AI-Pro-Enhancer) is a powerful accessory designed to elevate the performance of your UniFi Protect AI Camera Pro. This advanced solution significantly boosts your monitoring capabilities by extending infrared illumination range and improving detection accuracy. The Enhancer integrates seamlessly with your AI Pro Camera, providing exceptional night vision and superior motion detection. It features a high-powered infrared illuminator that significantly extends the camera's night vision range, ensuring clear visibility in low-light or complete darkness. This extended range allows for effective monitoring of expansive areas even during nighttime hours.

detailed_description.heading: Enhance Your Surveillance Capabilities
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi AI Pro Enhancer (UACC-AI-Pro-Enhancer) is a powerful accessory designed to elevate the performance of your UniFi Protect AI Camera Pro. This advanced solution significantly boosts your monitoring capabilities by extending infrared illumination range and improving detection accuracy. The Enhancer integrates seamlessly with your AI Pro Camera, providing exceptional night vision and superior motion detection. It features a high-powered infrared illuminator that significantly extends the camera's night vision range, ensuring clear visibility in low-light or complete darkness. This extended range allows for effective monitoring of expansive areas even during nighttime hours.

detailed_description.heading: Detection Accuracy and Broader Coverage
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi AI Pro Enhancer boasts integrated radar technology that enhances motion detection accuracy, particularly for people and vehicles. This radar system differentiates between objects and movement caused by environmental factors like wind or small animals, minimizing false alarms and ensuring you receive alerts for only relevant activity within the monitored area. Furthermore, the Enhancer features a built-in 600-lumen floodlight that provides additional illumination and deters potential intruders. The combination of extended infrared, radar detection, and supplementary floodlight illumination empowers you to achieve comprehensive video surveillance with exceptional clarity and accuracy.

detailed_description.heading: Weatherproof Design and Easy Integration
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi AI Pro Enhancer is built to withstand various environmental conditions. Its weatherproof housing ensures reliable operation outdoors, protecting the internal components from dust, rain, and other elements. This allows you to confidently deploy the Enhancer alongside your AI Pro Camera in both indoor and outdoor security applications. The Enhancer seamlessly integrates with your existing UniFi Protect system. Installation is straightforward, and the device automatically pairs with your AI Pro Camera. Management is also simplified through the intuitive UniFi Protect software, allowing you to monitor the Enhancer's status and configure settings from a centralized location.

detailed_description.heading: Conclusion
detailed_description.text: With its extended night vision, improved detection accuracy, and weatherproof design, the Ubiquiti UniFi AI Pro Enhancer empowers you to take your UniFi Protect AI Camera Pro to the next level. This powerful accessory enhances your surveillance capabilities, ensuring you capture clear footage and receive reliable alerts for all relevant activity within your monitored area.
